title: Cobble
description: Joke datapack that adds edible cobblestone
body:
Joke datapack that adds edible cobblestone

## Reviews  

> "very chobblesome"  
> [Apollo](https://modrinth.com/user/Apollo), creator of hit mod [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)
